parameters.content:
## QTP Alpaca Paper Broker Proxy v1.0

Token-gated internal proxy so legacy Code-node workflows (Trailing Stop Manager, monitors) can reach Alpaca WITHOUT embedded keys. The Alpaca-PAPER n8n credential lives ONLY here.

Guards: shared token, GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH only, paths must start /v2/, data host is read-only, PAPER host hardcoded (cannot reach live API by construction).

Contract: POST {token, host: paper|data, method, path, body} -> {__qtp_proxy_ok, status, data} | {__qtp_proxy_error: {status, message, body}}.

Key rotation = update the Alpaca-PAPER credential. Nothing else.
